name: Byeong-Gyu Min
description: Min Byung-Gyu was a retired hunter and one of the 10 S-Rank and only S-Rank Healer of South Korea. He was a close friend with the White Tiger's Guild Master Baek Yoon-Ho. He took part in the 4th Jeju Island Reclamation Raid and was a member of the Korean Raid Team tasked with killing the boss of the Jeju Island Gate.
